details.description: Overcast view along the Salzach River in Salzburg. A modern pedestrian bridge with a single mid‑river pier crosses the water, crowded with people carrying umbrellas. On the left bank rises a rocky, wooded hillside (part of the Mönchsberg) with a pale church topped by a green onion‑dome tower set on the slope above riverside buildings. On the right side of the scene stands a tall, narrow, dark spire of a neo‑Gothic church amid urban blocks and leafless trees. The light is flat and gray from low clouds; autumn foliage is visible on the right bank.

details.description: An overcast view of Salzburg along the Salzach River. In the foreground, a pedestrian bridge is crowded with people, spanning the calm water. Across the river, the old town's skyline rises with notable church towers; left on the hillside is a prominent church tower with a green copper roof, while to the right a tall spire pierces the skyline. The scene appears to be shot from the vicinity of the Makartsteg bridge, looking toward the Dom and cathedral quarter. The overall mood is muted by gray clouds, with subdued reflection on the river surface and autumnal trees along the banks.

details.description: Overcast, rainy view across the Salzach River in Salzburg. A modern, low-profile pedestrian bridge spans the river with many people carrying umbrellas. On the left, a hillside rises with a small church featuring a tall tower topped by a green onion-dome; beneath and around it are historic buildings. At the right, a slender brick church tower with a steep dark spire stands above trees and townhouses. The scene captures the riverfront cityscape between the Old Town and the New Town quarters, with muted reflections on the water and low clouds overhead.

details.description: A cloudy, overcast scene along the Salzach River in Salzburg, Austria. In the foreground a pedestrian bridge carries a line of people with umbrellas across the water. The opposite riverbank reveals the historic Salzburg old town with two church towers and a cluster of traditional buildings on a hillside, creating a classic impression of the city's riverfront panorama. The riverbank is pebbly and the overall mood is moody and damp from the weather.

details.description: A view of the Salzach River in Salzburg, Austria, on a cloudy, rainy day. The river flows horizontally across the foreground with a grey, reflective surface. In the midground, a pedestrian bridge (the Marko-Feingold-Steg) spans the river, crowded with people holding umbrellas; its railings appear dense, likely due to attached love locks. On the left bank, the steep, wooded slope of the Mönchsberg hill rises, dominated by the Müllner Kirche (Parish Church of Mülln) with its distinctive baroque tower and onion dome. On the right bank, the slender, pointed brick spire of the Evangelische Christuskirche (Christ Church) is visible. Overhead, faint power lines or trolleybus wires cross the top of the frame, suggesting the photo was taken from a bridge with traffic infrastructure.

details.description: An overcast, wide-angle shot of the Salzach river in Salzburg, Austria. In the foreground, the river flows under the Marko-Feingold-Steg (formerly Makartsteg), a pedestrian bridge crowded with people holding umbrellas. On the left bank, the Müllner Kirche (Parish Church of Mülln) stands prominently with its green-domed bell tower and red-roofed nave, nestled against the steep, wooded cliffs of the Mönchsberg. The sky is a uniform grey, and several power lines are visible across the top of the frame. The water reflects the dull light of the cloudy day.

details.description: Overcast riverside cityscape with a calm, wide river and a pedestrian bridge running along the right edge. On a small hill beside the river stands a church with a red roof and a square tower featuring a clock and a small cupola; farther downstream another tall, slender Gothic spire rises above the old-town skyline. Promenades and trees line the riverbank, and historic stone-and-plaster buildings cluster along the water.

details.description: A gray, overcast riverside townscape. Across the water a hillside town features a tall church spire and a cluster of historic buildings with red-tiled roofs, and a castle-like structure on the hill. In the foreground, a narrow riverbank promenade runs along the near shore with a low edge; the river is calm and reflects the embankment and skyline. The overall mood is moody with muted colors and soft light.

details.description: Overcast riverfront cityscape: a wide river with gentle ripples runs through a European town. On the right bank is a paved promenade with people walking (some with umbrellas) and a low metal-railed pedestrian bridge crossing the river. On the left bank, a baroque-style hilltop church with a tall slender spire and red-tiled roof stands above the embankment, with additional church spires visible farther in the background. Leafless and autumnal trees line the banks, and a gravelly shoreline appears at the water’s edge.

details.description: An overcast daytime riverside town with historic architecture along the water. In the distance along the far bank, a tall church spire rises above a cluster of old buildings and fortress-like towers. The near bank features a curved promenade and a calm river reflecting the gray sky, with a few people visible along the edge. The scene conveys a European townscape set along a wide river, with architectural features including a church tower and town walls visible across the water.

details.description: The image, which is rotated 90 degrees clockwise (top is to the left), depicts a gloomy, overcast view of the Salzach River in Salzburg, Austria. The river flows in the foreground (right side of the image frame), appearing grey and calm. On the opposite bank (left side of the image frame, representing the top/background), the cityscape is visible. A prominent church sits on a rocky elevation (the Mönchsberg hill) in the mid-ground; this is the Müllner Kirche, characterized by its steep roof and tower. Further in the distance, the slender, dark Gothic spire of the Franziskanerkirche rises against the grey sky. The riverbank is lined with a stone wall and bare trees, indicating a late autumn or winter setting. Power lines cut across the sky in the upper left portion of the frame.

details.description: A landscape photograph (oriented vertically) showing the Salzach river in Salzburg, Austria, under a heavy, overcast grey sky. In the foreground, the Marko-Feingold-Steg (formerly Makartsteg) pedestrian bridge crosses the river, with numerous 'love locks' visible on its railings. The river water is a dull, reflective grey. On the far bank, the historic architecture of the city is visible, including the prominent Müllner Kirche (Augustinerkirche) with its distinctive tower and the Bürgerspitalkirche St. Blasius. The Mönchsberg hill rises behind the buildings on the right side of the frame.
